prompt: A {argument name="photography style" default="vintage film photography"} portrait of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} smiling broadly at the camera. She is leaning forward playfully while holding the handlebars of a bicycle on a sunny neighborhood street. She wears a {argument name="top clothing" default="white short-sleeved t-shirt"}, a {argument name="bottom clothing" default="dark blue pleated skirt"}, white socks, and white sneakers. Her long dark hair blows slightly in the breeze. The bicycle has a front wire basket containing a {argument name="basket contents" default="clear plastic bag of oranges"}. The background features a paved road, dappled sunlight through trees, and a utility pole, capturing a nostalgic, bright summer day aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张 {argument name="photography style" default="复古胶片摄影"} 风格的肖像，主角是一位 {argument name="subject description" default="年轻的亚洲女性"}，正对着镜头灿烂微笑。她俏皮地向前倾身，双手扶着自行车把手，背景是阳光明媚的街区街道。她穿着一件 {argument name="top clothing" default="白色短袖 T 恤"}、一条 {argument name="bottom clothing" default="深蓝色百褶裙"}，搭配白袜和白色运动鞋。她乌黑的长发在微风中轻轻飘动。自行车的前车筐里放着 {argument name="basket contents" default="一袋透明塑料袋装的橙子"}。背景是铺设好的道路、透过树叶洒下的斑驳阳光以及一根电线杆，捕捉到了怀旧而明亮的夏日氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 骑自行车的女孩复古胶片肖像：生成一张照片级逼真、充满怀旧感的肖像，描绘了一位年轻女性在阳光明媚的街道上与自行车合影的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
